digest.component_or_area: Rebar Bot signing identity / secret provisioning
propositions: No shared Rebar Bot identity ticket or SSH authorship key exists and one must be created for the AWS and GitHub bot environments to share.
An ed25519 keypair is generated for the bot and registered as a gate-exempt identity ticket with its public key, with the private key never committed to the repo.
The SSM parameter /rebar/prod/rebar-bot-signing-key is declared in rebar_secret_params in infra/terraform/ssm.tf as an IaC-tracked SecureString placeholder with ignore_changes on value.
The private key value is provisioned into both AWS SSM SecureString /rebar/prod/rebar-bot-signing-key and GitHub Actions secret REBAR_BOT_SIGNING_KEY on navapbc/rebar.
Git-email resolution is verified so that a git user.email of joeoakhart+bot@navapbc.com resolves via the resolver to the Rebar Bot identity ticket via case-insensitive match.
